claim_boundary: CAD seal-stack review for ingress paths; not IP certification or lab evidence.

paths.strategy: continuous die-cut display adhesive forms primary splash/dust barrier
paths.lab_closure: display bond peel, splash exposure, and post-drop screen-lift inspection

paths.strategy: hydrophobic dust mesh bonded behind grille with molded rear chamber isolated from USB load saddle
paths.lab_closure: speaker sweep before/after dust and splash, mesh adhesive visual inspection

paths.strategy: individual hydrophobic meshes sit behind each molded microphone port
paths.lab_closure: microphone sensitivity/noise floor before and after dust/splash exposure

paths.strategy: hydrophobic mesh behind the top port to keep the second microphone from being an unprotected ingress path
paths.lab_closure: top microphone sensitivity/noise floor before and after dust/splash exposure

paths.strategy: compressed earpiece gasket and hydrophobic mesh behind handset slot
paths.lab_closure: receiver SPL/leak check plus splash exposure at earpiece slot

paths.strategy: open USB-C connector is managed by a four-sided elastomer receptacle seat, molded drip break, internal drain shelf, and load saddle
paths.lab_closure: USB insertion/rub, side splash, water-retention visual inspection, and gasket compression-set check

paths.strategy: rear cover glass is bonded with a four-sided black PSA gasket plus internal baffles to limit dust and flare
paths.lab_closure: camera dust inspection, focus/MTF check, flare check, and cover-glass adhesive peel review

paths.opening: power and volume button rail gaps
paths.strategy: external orange caps actuate through silicone gaskets backed by molded labyrinth rails on each side-key opening
paths.lab_closure: button force/travel after dust exposure, side-splash inspection, and gasket compression set check

open_product_decisions: USB-C gasket/drip geometry is modeled, but an IP claim still needs supplier connector detail and splash/retention evidence.
Side-button gasket/labyrinth geometry is modeled, but needs supplier material, compression-set, and splash-test evidence.
IP54 is design intent only until dust and splash lab rows are populated.
release_rule: Every modeled ingress path must have a CAD seal stack, mesh overhang where acoustic ports are open, and measured dust/splash results before environmental release.
